title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Codebase Onboarding Docs — 5 Skills for Getting New Engineers Up to Speed Fast
description: For engineering leads and staff engineers, this pack generates architecture overviews, maps module dependencies, documents environment setup steps, explains key design decisions, and produces contributor guides so new hires can become productive in days instead of weeks
gumroad_description:
The onboarding docs that never got written are costing you a week per new hire.

Who this is for:
— Engineering leads whose onboarding process is "read the code and ask questions"
— Staff engineers who explain the same architecture three times a year to new joiners
— Platform teams building internal developer experience tools

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Architecture overview generator (how the system fits together)
— Skill 2: Module dependency mapper (what calls what and why)
— Skill 3: Environment setup step documenter
— Skill 4: Key design decision explainer (the reasoning behind the choices)
— Skill 5: Contributor guide writer
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Productive new hires in days, not weeks. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
